description: Russia deployed five launch sites for "Shakhedov" on the border with Belarus, - "Radio Svaboda" Journalists found at least five such facilities in the Bryansk, Oryol and Smolensk regions of the Russian Federation. Most were built or expanded after the summer of 2024. From there, drones are launched over Kyiv and the western regions of Ukraine. They often fly along Belarus or enter its airspace, which complicates...
description_en: Russia deployed five launch sites for "Shakhedov" on the border with Belarus, - "Radio Svaboda" Journalists found at least five such facilities in the Bryansk, Oryol and Smolensk regions of the Russian Federation. Most were built or expanded after the summer of 2024. From there, drones are launched over Kyiv and the western regions of Ukraine. They often fly along Belarus or enter its airspace, which complicates...
description_uk: россия развернула пять пусковых площадок для "Шахедов" у границы с Беларусью, - "Радыё Свабода" Журналисты нашли минимум пять таких объектов в Брянской, Орловской и Смоленской областях рф. Большинство построили или расширили после лета 2024 года. Оттуда дроны запускают по Киеву и западным областям Украины. Они часто летят вдоль Беларуси или заходят в ее воздушное пространство, что усложняет...

title: Putin's war is already costing Russia 65 billion rubles a day Russian...
title_en: Putin's war is already costing Russia 65 billion rubles a day Russian...

description: Putin's war is already costing Russia 65 billion rubles a day Russian military spending in the first quarter of 2026 reached a record 5.9 trillion rubles, according to Janis Kluge, a researcher at the German Institute for International Security Problems, based on data from the Ministry of Finance. This is already 46% of the entire Russian budget. Simply put, almost every second ruble goes to the army and weapons production. On average, war...
description_en: Putin's war is already costing Russia 65 billion rubles a day Russian military spending in the first quarter of 2026 reached a record 5.9 trillion rubles, according to Janis Kluge, a researcher at the German Institute for International Security Problems, based on data from the Ministry of Finance. This is already 46% of the entire Russian budget. Simply put, almost every second ruble goes to the army and weapons production. On average, war...
description_uk: Путинская война обходится россиюшке уже в 65 млрд рублей в день Военные расходы рф в первом квартале 2026 года достигли рекордных 5,9 трлн рублей, подсчитал исследователь германского Института проблем международной безопасности Янис Клюге на основе данных Минфина. Это уже 46% всего российского бюджета. Проще говоря, почти каждый второй рубль уходит на армию и производство оружия. В среднем война...

title_en: Kyiv: EU confirms launch of formal accession talks with Ukraine, Moldova,...

description: EU confirms launch of formal accession talks with Ukraine, Moldova, on June 15. "We will open the cluster on fundamentals; the backbone of the accession process," European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen said on June 12. "It covers the core values and principles on which the EU is built, from the rule of law to strong democratic institutions."
description_en: EU confirms launch of formal accession talks with Ukraine, Moldova, on June 15. "We will open the cluster on fundamentals; the backbone of the accession process," European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen said on June 12. "It covers the core values and principles on which the EU is built, from the rule of law to strong democratic institutions."
description_uk: EU confirms launch of formal accession talks with Ukraine, Moldova, on June 15. "We will open the cluster on fundamentals; the backbone of the accession process," European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen said on June 12. "It covers the core values and principles on which the EU is built, from the rule of law to strong democratic institutions."

title: 🔹We are opening the market for recruiting foreigners to strengthen...

description: 🔹We are opening the market for recruiting foreigners to strengthen combat units and save the lives of Ukrainian soldiers. Our goal is to fill up to 30–50% of the positions of stormtroopers and infantrymen with foreigners. 🔹One more key question. Justice for those who have been in the Defense Forces the longest and have spent the most time in combat. For them, by the end of the year, we will begin gradual dismissal from service. This is just the first stage...
description_en: 🔹We are opening the market for recruiting foreigners to strengthen combat units and save the lives of Ukrainian soldiers. Our goal is to fill up to 30–50% of the positions of stormtroopers and infantrymen with foreigners. 🔹One more key question. Justice for those who have been in the Defense Forces the longest and have spent the most time in combat. For them, by the end of the year, we will begin gradual dismissal from service. This is just the first stage...
description_uk: 🔹Відкриваємо ринок рекрутингу іноземців для підсилення бойових підрозділів та збереження життів українських військових. Наша мета — до 30–50% посад штурмовиків та піхотинців заповнити іноземцями. 🔹⁠Ще одне ключове питання. Справедливість для тих, хто найдовше в Силах оборони та провів найбільше часу на бойових. Для них до кінця року починаємо поступове звільнення зі служби. Це лише перший етап...

For assault infantry - 10-14 months, for UAV operators, gunners, EW specialists and other combat specialties - 24 months, for other forward services - also 24 months. After the end of the contract, they promise a guaranteed delay, which will be...

For assault infantry - 10-14 months, for UAV operators, gunners, EW specialists and other combat specialties - 24 months, for other forward services - also 24 months. After the end of the contract, they promise a guaranteed delay, which will be...
description_uk: Федоров раскрыл детали реформы армии По его словам, первый пакет решений уже утвердило правительство. Появятся три типа контрактов. Для штурмовой пехоты - 10-14 месяцев, для операторов БПЛА, артиллеристов, специалистов РЭБ и других боевых специальностей - 24 месяца, для остальных направлений службы - тоже 24 месяца. description: 💸Ilon Musk became the first trillionaire in the history of mankind, — Reuters The agency came to this conclusion after the record SpaceX IPO. The company raised $75 billion in the largest IPO in US history. The main part of Musk's capital now falls precisely on SpaceX, the fortune of which is estimated at approximately $866 billion. For comparison: in the ranking of the world's richest people, the second place is occupied by...
description_en: 💸Ilon Musk became the first trillionaire in the history of mankind, — Reuters The agency came to this conclusion after the record SpaceX IPO. The company raised $75 billion in the largest IPO in US history. The main part of Musk's capital now falls precisely on SpaceX, the fortune of which is estimated at approximately $866 billion. For comparison: in the ranking of the world's richest people, the second place is occupied by...
description_uk: 💸Илон Маск стал первым триллионером в истории человечества, — Reuters К такому выводу агентство пришло после рекордного IPO SpaceX. Компания привлекла $75 млрд, проведя крупнейшее размещение акций в истории США. Основная часть капитала Маска сейчас приходится именно на SpaceX, доля в которой оценивается примерно в $866 млрд. Для сравнения: в рейтинге богатейших людей мира второе место занимает...
